userIntroduction: I'm Luis — a builder, writer, and problem-solver from Puerto Rico. This site is my personal workshop: a place for experiments, notes, essays, small tools, and poems generated by a machine about the strange beauty of code.

I care about automation, clean systems, learning deeply, and building things that make life feel more manageable and more human. Sometimes that looks like software. Sometimes it looks like writing. Most of the time, it starts as a question I can't stop thinking about.
